tips_en: Start with the virtual try‑on paper because it already runs at industrial scale on Taobao and provides a concrete, multi‑reference diffusion pipeline and inference acceleration that underpin the later works. The 3D reconstruction paper adds geometry‑aware view synthesis with a similar diffusion backbone, while the speech‑driven HOI video paper complements it by generating product demo videos; together they illustrate how diffusion models progress from image editing to 3D reconstruction and then to interactive video generation.
tips_zh: 建议先阅读虚拟试穿论文，因为它已在淘宝实现工业化部署，提供多参考扩散框架和推理加速技巧，直接支撑后续研究。3D 重建论文利用几何感知稀疏视角生成扩展了扩散模型能力，而语音驱动的交互视频合成则补充了从产品图像到视频展示的全链路；三者共同展示了从图像编辑到三维重建再到交互视频生成的技术演进。
